challenges.title: Text Emphasis
challenges.description: Create a paragraph that uses <strong> for bold text, <em> for italic text, and <u> for underlined text. Each formatting element should wrap at least one word. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Write a paragraph with bold, italic, and underlined text -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a

paragraph element' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should close the

element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element for bold text' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an element for italic text' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element for underlined text' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element'
hints: <strong> is for important text (bold), <em> is for emphasized text (italic)
Wrap individual words or phrases with the formatting tags inside your paragraph

challenges.title: Rich Text
challenges.description: Create HTML that uses all five text formatting elements: <strong> for bold, <em> for italic, <mark> for highlighted text, <sub> for subscript (like H2O), and <sup> for superscript (like x2). Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Write HTML using strong, em, mark, sub, and sup -->

"""
challenges.test_code: assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element for highlighted text' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element for subscript' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a element for superscript' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element'
hints: <mark> highlights text, <sub> is for subscript (like in H<sub>2</sub>O), <sup> is for superscript (like x<sup>2</sup>)
You can put these formatting elements inside a paragraph or use multiple paragraphs
